markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To refine content strategy by aligning it with specific customer personas and needs.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content is misaligned:** Current content is too technical and focuses on internal processes (e.g., regulations), not customer problems (e.g., authorization rates), creating a review bottleneck and liability risks.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**New priority is PayFacs/ISOs:** After successfully building the "High-Opportunity" (high-risk) merchant channel, the focus shifts to partners (PayFacs/ISOs) who drive the majority of transaction volume.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2318.0)
  - [**Messaging must be nuanced:** Content must avoid disparaging partners (e.g., don't over-promote being a "directly licensed acquirer" to partners who are not) and use indirect language for high-risk clients (e.g., "iGaming" vs. "gambling").](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [**Key triggers for PayFacs/ISOs:** Partners seek Rapyd to improve authorization rates (a direct path to revenue), add omni-channel capabilities (Europe only), or gain redundancy after an outage. ISOs specifically need fast merchant onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2611.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Content Misalignment & Review Bottleneck

  - [Current content is too deep and speaks to Rapyd's internal processes, not the customer's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**Example:** A "Peru Payments Guide" over-indexed on regulations, FX, and taxation—topics that create liability and are irrelevant to merchants.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [This approach creates a review bottleneck, as only Mark and one other SME can perform final checks, slowing publication.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Goal:** Shift to an audience-first approach, answering high-impact questions directly and avoiding overly technical or liability-prone topics.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### Solution: Refined Customer Personas

  - [The previous persona document was too granular; the strategy will now focus on three core buckets.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [**1. Payment Facilitators (PayFacs) & ISOs (Independent Sales Organizations)**](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
      - [**Definition:** Partners who integrate payments into their own platforms (e.g., Wix, Shopify, QuickBooks).](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
      - [**Role:** Handle merchant onboarding (PayFacs) or just sales/support (ISOs), while Rapyd provides the backend infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [**Titles:** Director-level or above in Payments, E-commerce, Partnerships, BizDev, or Product.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [**Primary Triggers:**](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2611.0)
          - [**Better Authorization Rates:** A direct path to revenue by rescuing lost sales.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2685.0)
              - [**Rapyd's Edge:** 91–95% auth rate for low-risk clients.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2771.0)
          - [**Omni-channel Expansion:** Adding POS capabilities for physical locations (Europe only).](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
          - [**Redundancy:** Seeking a backup provider after an outage or to optimize auth rates.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2936.0)
          - [**ISO-Specific:** Slow merchant onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3162.0)
              - **Rapyd's Edge:** 88% of low-risk merchants onboard in \<1 hr; 95% of onboarded merchants in \<48 hrs.
  - [**2. Enterprise Merchants**](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
      - [**Definition:** Large firms (e.g., Uber, Amazon) that manage their own payments infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
      - [**Motivation:** Gain control, visibility, and avoid partner markups.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [**3. High-Opportunity Industries**](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
      - [**Definition:** Industries considered "high-risk" by others (e.g., iGaming, adult, CBD, crypto, travel).](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
      - [**Motivation:** These clients need a provider and will do the work to integrate directly.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)
      - [**Messaging Challenge:** Must use indirect language (e.g., "iGaming") to avoid being perceived as a "shady" high-risk specialist.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
      - [**Key Message:** Quick onboarding, high auth rates, and long-term partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2275.0)

### Goal: Reinforce Brand Perception

  - [The objective is not to change perception, but to reinforce Rapyd's current image as an innovative, hands-on disruptor.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3242.0)
  - [**Key Attributes to Reinforce:** Innovative, hands-on, fast, disruptive.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3242.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3344.0)
      - [Share the previous buyer persona guide and other relevant materials (e.g., sales calls, battle cards) with George.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3448.0)
  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3448.0)
      - [Build a comprehensive persona document for the three customer buckets using this discussion and Mark's materials.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3448.0)
      - [Update internal writing guidelines to reflect feedback on compliance, depth, and messaging nuances.](https://fathom.video/share/MFxuGKdxF3LiVo2wKEDbs8ezJdK9fsvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
